name: Baked Potatoes, Farmer Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Wash and scrub potatoes; dry thoroughly. Rub surface with 2 tablespoons butter. Prick skin with fork, allowing steam to escape during cooking.
3. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until easily pierced with a fork.
4. Slash tops in an X; gently squeeze out most of the potato into a large bowl, keeping the skin intact. Mash the potatoes with a fork.
5. In hot oil in a medium skillet, sauté onion and green pepper until tender (about 5 minutes). Heat milk.
6. Add sautéed vegetables, hot milk, butter, salt, pepper, paprika, and 1 cup grated cheese to mashed potato mixture. Mix well with a fork.
7. Pile lightly into potato shells, mounding high. Sprinkle the remaining grated cheese over the tops of potatoes, dividing evenly.
8. Return to oven; bake for 15 minutes or until thoroughly hot and cheese is melted. Makes 6 servings
